name: divergence_bare_exec_upload_pack_rejection
description: Bare 'git-upload-pack' (no repo arg): Rust rejects locally with exit 1 (no upstream reached). Go forwards and paramiko rejects with exit 128.

divergence.description: Rust sidecar rejects bare exec locally; Go sidecar forwards unchanged.
divergence.go_expected: exit_status=128, mock observes exactly 1 exec event from 100.64.0.20
divergence.rust_expected: exit_status=1, mock observes exactly 0 exec events from 100.64.0.21
